text_block_list.text:
I'm out on a nice walk in the evening one day
when I suddenly run into a very sweaty Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: Did you have a big meal or something?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've been so busy with dorm duties lately that I
haven't been keeping regular mealtimes, you
see...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I got too cavalier with my diet, so when I weighed
myself the other day, well... Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't want my fans to know I've been training
extra.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So I didn't say anything so they wouldn't find
out... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So, please, don't tell anyone about this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'm going to run up and down the stairs five
more times! Let's do it together!
choice_data_list: I have to do it too?!
I have to do it too?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yup! You're keeping my secret now, so you're
practically my partner in crime! ♪

I join in on the rest of her exercises and help Fuji
Kiseki get back into her regular weight range!
